programmes.show_description: Action thriller with Jason Momoa. A logging company owner and his family find themselves in a dangerous situation when they uncover a drug trafficker's hidden stash of cocaine in their cabin.
A suicidal artist goes into the desert, where he finds his doppelgänger, a homicidal drifter.

A 9-year-old's birthday party ends in an alleged assault, bullying accusations and feuding mothers.
A woman claims she was fired from her job after a good friend accused her of asking for kickbacks from insurance referrals.
A man who took in his sick sister is surprised when she leaves her entire estate to a cousin; the cousin accuses him of theft.
All hell breaks loose when a woman asks her mother to take care of her homeless friend's child.
A woman in search of a rose-themed tattoo claims she sustained an injury and infection at a tattoo parlour and sues for damages.
Judge Judy refuses to accept a young man's rehearsed answer after he is accused of stealing a friend's motorcycle and wrecking it.
An unsuspecting, older couple get the shock of their lives when they are pulled over by police for driving an allegedly stolen vehicle.
A man comes at his friend with a pipe after his motorcycle is allegedly slammed to the ground; his friend returns the violence with a knife.
A man sues his brother for medical bills and lost wages due to an assault; Judge Judy threatens to throw a man out of court for speaking out of turn.

When a UK fisherman is murdered and dumped in the River Thames, forensics link three men to the scene. But evidence lost in the river makes convicting his killers challenging.
A woman's husband reports her falling overboard into Lake Erie, US, but police suspect foul play. When her body surfaces three weeks on, it's clear this was no boating accident.
When mother of two Madeline 'Maddi' Kingsbury went missing, her distraught sister headed to TikTok and pleaded with the public to help find her.
Ghost in the Machine: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).
Three years after the disappearance of a young woman, police uncover new evidence that only baffles them further.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. A geneticist is kidnapped by a group wanting to use her research to create a race of genetically superior soldiers.
Martial arts adventure with Jet Li. A Chinese detective travels to Paris in search of the head an international drug ring, but ends up framed for murder by a corrupt French cop.
Martial arts thriller with Jet Li and Jason Statham. An FBI agent is drawn into warfare between Yakuza and Triad gangs as he seeks revenge on the assassin who murdered his partner.
Apartheid drama with Stephen Dorff. An English youngster is shocked by the brutal racism endemic in his South African school, and vows to do everything he can to fight for justice.
Slithering scares from Hammer. A couple move to a Cornish village where it becomes apparent that locals are being killed by a snake-like creature and their neighbour harbours a terrible secret.

An 18-year-old sues the father of her child for return of her belongings and for filing allegedly false CPS reports.
A mother of two allegedly suffers a broken nose at the hands of her sister-in-law during a heated fight.
A man claims he was provoked by his landlord to retaliate online after she allegedly slandered a Nigerian immigrant.
A young couple with a child saves 3K for their first apartment but claim it was dreadful; they are accused of smoking pot.
A mother of two is accused of stealing her uncle's furniture after their lease-to-own agreement falls apart; she claims he took the furniture himself.
A man insists that a young boy looks and acts just like him but his ex-lover says it's impossible and sues him for filing for a paternity test.
A man and woman continue to live with each other 18 years after their divorce; when they finally part, the woman wants everything they shared.
When a young car salesman disrespects the Judge, she advises that he take his parents out to a long lunch when the show airs.
A landlord says he was conned into letting his tenants out of their lease; they sue him for the return of their security deposit.

A murdered US woman is found 230 miles from home, dumped from a bridge into swamp. Was she killed by someone she met online, or by her own husband?
US police find the dismembered body parts of a missing woman in an alligator-infested creek. They must race to prove who was responsible for this killing.
In October of 2023, Jessy Kurczewski went on trial for the intentional homicide of Lynn Hernan, along with two counts of felony theft for stealing from Hernan.
A father confesses to the murder of his daughter, which is later dismissed. Years later, new evidence points to a new suspect.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Trivette's old girlfriend get his help to locate her father, and then kills him.
Sci-fi thriller with Jason Statham. A crooked prison warden coerces a falsely imprisoned convict into taking part in a high-octane race where convicts battle to the death in customised cars.
Action drama with Danny Trejo. A Mexican mercenary is hired to assassinate a politician, but when his employers betray him, he teams up with militant illegal immigrants to seek bloody revenge.
